title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
author: openai-blog
raw_description: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.
summary: Omio 利用 OpenAI 技术构建对话式旅行体验，加速产品开发，转型为 AI 原生公司。
analysis_note: 商业化应用案例，技术深度一般，但展示了AI在旅行领域的实际落地。
